name: Ice Box Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter and brown sugar together until well combined.
2. Add the eggs, baking powder, salt, flour, and soda to the mixture. Stir until a dough forms.
3. Shape the dough into three loaves on sheets of waxed paper, about 2 inches square and 5 inches long.
4. Wrap each loaf tightly in waxed paper and place them in the refrigerator.
5. Chill the loaves for at least 2 hours.
6. To bake, slice the chilled loaves into thin pieces (about 1 inch thick).
7. Place the slices one inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes.
